metadata.description: Challenges validating metrics collection infrastructure including parsing throughput baselines, cache hit ratio thresholds, circuit breaker state metrics, connection limiter utilization tracking, rate limiter saturation detection, and health check endpoint correctness across all protocol services and format parsers

challenges.name: Parsing Throughput Baseline Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that parsing throughput baselines are collected for all 17 format parsers. Each parser must report documents-per-second and bytes-per-second metrics when parsing representative documents. Baseline values must be recorded and available for regression detection. Throughput must exceed minimum thresholds: at least 100 docs/sec for lightweight formats (plaintext, key-value) and at least 10 docs/sec for heavyweight formats (LaTeX, Jupyter).

outputs.name: throughput_results
outputs.description: Map of format ID to docs/sec and bytes/sec metrics

outputs.name: formats_below_threshold
outputs.description: Formats whose throughput fell below minimum baseline

outputs.name: formats_measured
outputs.description: Number of formats with throughput metrics

assertions.message: All 17 format parsers must have throughput baselines
No format parser may fall below its minimum throughput baseline
All throughput measurements must produce valid numeric values

challenges.name: Parsing Throughput Regression Detection
challenges.description: Verify that parsing throughput does not regress by more than 20% compared to established baselines. Run each parser against its baseline document set three times and compare median throughput to the stored baseline. Any regression exceeding the 20% threshold must be flagged with the format ID, baseline value, measured value, and percentage degradation.

outputs.name: regression_results
outputs.description: Map of format ID to baseline vs measured throughput comparison

outputs.name: regressed_formats
outputs.description: Formats that regressed beyond the threshold

outputs.name: measurement_iterations
outputs.description: Number of iterations per format for median calculation

assertions.message: No format parser may regress more than 20% below its throughput baseline
At least 3 iterations required for median calculation
All regression comparison results must be valid

challenges.name: DocumentCache Hit Ratio Threshold Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that DocumentCache reports cache hit ratio metrics and that the ratio meets minimum thresholds under normal usage patterns. Simulate a workload of 1000 parse requests with 70% repeat documents and verify the cache hit ratio exceeds 60%. Verify that hit count, miss count, and total request count are all tracked and available.

outputs.name: cache_metrics
outputs.description: Cache hit count, miss count, total requests, and hit ratio

outputs.name: hit_ratio_met
outputs.description: Whether the minimum hit ratio threshold was met

outputs.name: metrics_available
outputs.description: List of cache metrics that are tracked

assertions.message: Cache hit ratio must meet the minimum threshold of 60%
At least 3 cache metrics must be tracked (hits, misses, total)
All cache metrics must be valid numeric values

challenges.name: DocumentCache Eviction Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that DocumentCache tracks LRU eviction events with metrics including eviction count, evicted document IDs, and cache size at eviction time. Fill the cache beyond its maximum capacity and verify that eviction metrics accurately reflect the number of documents evicted and that the cache size never exceeds the configured maximum.

outputs.name: eviction_metrics
outputs.description: Eviction count, max cache size observed, and eviction timestamps

outputs.name: cache_exceeded_max
outputs.description: Whether cache size ever exceeded the configured maximum

outputs.name: evictions_recorded
outputs.description: Number of eviction events recorded

assertions.message: Cache size must never exceed the configured maximum
At least one eviction event must be recorded when cache overflows
All eviction metrics must be accurately recorded

challenges.name: CircuitBreaker State Transition Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that CircuitBreaker reports metrics for state transitions across CLOSED, OPEN, and HALF_OPEN states. Track transition counts, time spent in each state, failure counts that triggered OPEN, and successful probes that triggered CLOSED. Simulate failure sequences across all 8 protocol services and verify that state metrics are collected for each.

outputs.name: state_metrics
outputs.description: Map of protocol to circuit breaker state transition metrics

outputs.name: services_without_metrics
outputs.description: Services that do not report circuit breaker metrics

outputs.name: transitions_recorded
outputs.description: Total state transitions recorded across all services

assertions.message: All protocol services must report circuit breaker state metrics
At least 16 state transitions must be recorded (2 per service minimum)
All circuit breaker state metrics must contain valid state names and counts

challenges.name: CircuitBreaker Failure Rate Monitoring
challenges.description: Verify that CircuitBreaker tracks rolling failure rate metrics with a configurable window. The failure rate should be calculated over the last N operations (default 100) and must accurately reflect the proportion of failed operations. When the failure rate exceeds the configured threshold, the circuit must open and the rate must be reported in the metrics.

outputs.name: failure_rate_results
outputs.description: Failure rate calculations and threshold breach events

outputs.name: rate_accuracy
outputs.description: Whether calculated failure rate matches actual failure proportion

outputs.name: threshold_breach_detected
outputs.description: Whether threshold breach triggered circuit open

assertions.message: Failure rate calculation must match actual failure proportion within 1% tolerance
Failure rate threshold breach must be detected and trigger circuit open
All failure rate metrics must be valid

challenges.name: ConnectionLimiter Utilization Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that ConnectionLimiter reports utilization metrics including current active connections, maximum concurrent connections observed, permits available, permits waiting, and utilization percentage. Simulate varying connection loads (25%, 50%, 75%, 100% of max) and verify utilization metrics accurately reflect the load at each level.

outputs.name: utilization_metrics
outputs.description: Map of load level to utilization metrics snapshot

outputs.name: inaccurate_readings
outputs.description: Utilization readings that do not match expected load level

outputs.name: load_levels_tested
outputs.description: Number of load levels tested

assertions.message: At least 4 load levels must be tested (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
All utilization readings must accurately reflect the actual connection load
All utilization metrics must contain valid numeric values

challenges.name: ConnectionLimiter Queue Depth Monitoring
challenges.description: Verify that ConnectionLimiter tracks queue depth metrics when connection requests exceed available permits. Saturate the limiter and enqueue additional requests, then verify that queue depth, max queue depth, and average wait time metrics are collected. Queue depth must return to zero once all pending requests are serviced.

outputs.name: queue_metrics
outputs.description: Queue depth, max depth, and average wait time metrics

outputs.name: queue_drained
outputs.description: Whether queue depth returned to zero after requests completed

outputs.name: wait_times_recorded
outputs.description: Whether per-request wait times were recorded

assertions.message: Queue depth must return to zero after all pending requests are serviced
Per-request wait times must be recorded when queuing occurs
All queue depth metrics must be valid

challenges.name: RateLimiter Saturation Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that RateLimiter (TokenBucket and AdaptiveRateLimiter) report saturation metrics including tokens available, tokens consumed per second, requests throttled, and saturation percentage. Generate request bursts that exceed the rate limit and verify that throttling events are counted and the saturation metric approaches 100%.

outputs.name: saturation_metrics
outputs.description: Token bucket saturation metrics during burst

outputs.name: throttle_events
outputs.description: List of throttle events with timestamps

outputs.name: saturation_detected
outputs.description: Whether saturation was detected during the burst

assertions.message: Rate limiter saturation must be detected when burst exceeds rate limit
At least one throttle event must be recorded during saturation
All saturation metrics must be valid

challenges.name: FormatRegistry Initialization Timing Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that FormatRegistry reports initialization timing metrics including total init duration, per-format registration time, lazy init trigger point, and whether initialization was triggered by first access. The lazy initialization must complete within 500ms and the timing data must be available for monitoring after initialization completes.

outputs.name: init_timing
outputs.description: Initialization timing breakdown: total duration, per-format times

outputs.name: init_within_threshold
outputs.description: Whether initialization completed within the threshold

outputs.name: lazy_init_confirmed
outputs.description: Whether lazy initialization pattern was confirmed

assertions.message: FormatRegistry initialization must complete within 500ms
FormatRegistry must use lazy initialization triggered on first access
All initialization timing metrics must be valid

challenges.name: StyleSheets Cache Efficiency Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that StyleSheets reports cache efficiency metrics including cache size, generation time saved by caching, and cache invalidation events via clearCache(). Generate stylesheets for both light and dark themes, measure time for initial generation vs cached retrieval, and verify the cached path is at least 10x faster than initial generation.

outputs.name: cache_efficiency
outputs.description: Initial generation time vs cached retrieval time per theme

outputs.name: speedup_met
outputs.description: Whether cached retrieval achieved the minimum speedup threshold

outputs.name: invalidation_works
outputs.description: Whether clearCache() properly invalidates and triggers regeneration

assertions.message: Cached stylesheet retrieval must be at least 10x faster than initial generation
clearCache() must properly invalidate cached stylesheets
All cache efficiency metrics must be valid

challenges.name: Health Check Aggregation Metrics
challenges.description: Verify that a health check can aggregate the status of all critical subsystems: FormatRegistry (initialized), DocumentCache (operational), CircuitBreaker per protocol (state), ConnectionLimiter (permits available), and RateLimiter (not saturated). The aggregated health status must be 'healthy' when all subsystems are operational and 'degraded' or 'unhealthy' when any subsystem reports a problem.

outputs.name: health_status
outputs.description: Per-subsystem health status and aggregated overall status

outputs.name: all_subsystems_reported
outputs.description: Whether all configured subsystems reported their status

outputs.name: degraded_detection_works
outputs.description: Whether degraded state is correctly detected when a subsystem fails

assertions.message: All critical subsystems must report health status
Degraded state must be detected when any subsystem is unhealthy
All health check results must contain valid status values
